## Source: amazon-inspector (a118efca65c484515f9ae2cee508db99ef356bb6dc1e9ec249858e561f96f089)
The package examplereactnative76 was found to contain malicious code.

## Source: ossf-package-analysis (2c592ab14953ee9968cc1312562fe97a8a8eb63447e15b3cabc2db9592b399a2)
The OpenSSF Package Analysis project identified 'examplereactnative76' @ 0.0.8 (npm) as malicious.

It is considered malicious because:

- The package communicates with a domain associated with malicious activity.

- The package executes one or more commands associated with malicious behavior.
